hero.subtitle: Luxury Real Estate Consultant
hero.description: Over 12 years connecting Colombian families with exceptional properties. Experience, discretion, and proven results.

about.title: About Me
about.heroTitle: Experience that transforms properties into homes
about.desc1: I am Aura Urrea, a certified real estate consultant with over 12 years of experience in the Colombian market. I specialize in high-value properties in Bogotá, Medellín, and the Caribbean Coast.
about.desc2: As part of Century 21, the largest real estate network in the world, I have access to exclusive resources, advanced valuation tools, and a network of national and international buyers.

services.title: Services
services.heroTitle: A complete service, tailored to you
services.buySellDesc: Comprehensive support in every stage of the buying and selling process, from searching to deed execution.
services.rentDesc: Professional management of residential and commercial rentals with secure contracts and legal backing.
services.valuationDesc: Market analysis and certified technical appraisals to know the real value of your property.
services.legalAdviceDesc: Document review, title search, and notary support with experts in real estate law.

contact.title: Contact
contact.desc: Whether you want to buy, sell or rent, I am available to accompany you in every step of the process. I respond in less than 2 hours.
contact.formSubtitle: I will contact you as soon as possible.
